934 ANTDPRST_TKNG_CD ANTDPRST_TKNG_CD N0415C1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antidepressant CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antidepressant medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
